channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: CI/CD na Magalu Cloud com GitHub Actions
item.description: Um dos problemas mais comuns em times de desenvolvimento não está no código em si, mas na forma como ele chega até produção. Mesmo equipes organizadas enfrentam situações como: diferenças entre...

item.title: Why Is Zod v4 Fast — and Where Is Its Ceiling?
item.description: Zod v4 is faster than v3. But almost nobody knows why. It's not just a cleaner codebase or smaller bundle — Zod v4 has a JIT-like code generator that builds specialized validation functions at...

item.title: Ng-News 26/09: AI & Angular, debounced() in v22, Oxidation Compiler in Analog
item.description: Ng-News 26-09 features three topics: the new Signal-based debounced API, the Oxidation compiler benchmark in Analog.js, and AI & Angular. Angular XSS Advisory A Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)...

item.title: Stop decompressing entire archives to get one file — introducing ARCX
item.description: Most archive formats make a simple task unnecessarily expensive: you need one file, so you download and decompress everything. I built ARCX, a compressed archive format designed to fix that. ARCX...

item.title: Gathering Hyrox Race Insights with Python
item.description: Overview I've been training for a while now for a series of Hyrox races. I did a mixed doubles race over the holidays, my first solo race last month, and I'm currently working up for another solo...

item.title: 🚀 Build a Schema-Based Wizard Form in Vue 3 (No Templates Needed)
item.description: If you've ever built multi-step forms in Vue, you know the usual pain: Managing step state manually Handling validation across steps Conditionally showing steps Keeping everything in sync What if...

item.title: Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers
item.description: Article URL: https://github.com/cockpit-project/cockpit Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47445599 Points: 14 # Comments: 0

item.title: Handling DodoPayments Webhooks with Firebase Cloud Functions
item.description: This guide walks through integrating DodoPayments webhook events into a Firebase Cloud Function. Firebase is a natural choice for handling webhooks because it provides a serverless environment...

item.title: Stop Fighting with PDF Libraries: Generate Dynamic PDFs Using HTML & JSON
item.description: Generating PDFs in a web application is a task that almost every developer dreads. Whether it’s an invoice, a shipping label, or an event ticket, we usually find ourselves stuck between two...

item.title: Best Free CRM Tools for Freelancers 2026: Land More Clients Without Breaking Budget
item.description: TL;DR: Most freelancers waste 15+ hours/week on manual client management. The best free CRMs in 2026 — HubSpot, Zoho, and Pipedrive — can automate lead tracking, client communications, and project...

item.title: Marc Andreessen is a philosophical zombie
item.description: I admit, this is an innovation I did not see coming: Silicon Valley has invented the philosophical zombie from the classic thought experiment "lol how crazy would it be if there were a...

item.title: The coolest game controller for your phone is $50 off
item.description: The MCON is the closest to a Swiss army knife that a controller can be. No, it doesn’t contain a can opener, but it makes up for it with a surprising array of features. Once you attach your...

item.title: Speagle Malware Hijacks Cobra DocGuard to Steal Data via Compromised Servers
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new malware dubbed Speagle that hijacks the functionality and infrastructure of a legitimate program called Cobra DocGuard. "Speagle is designed to...

item.title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
item.description: AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.

item.title: Hermès doesn’t include a power adapter with its $5,150 charging case
item.description: Over a decade after Apple first partnered with Hermès for a special Apple Watch collaboration, the French luxury goods maker has released a new collection of leather-wrapped charging accessories...

item.title: 54 EDR Killers Use BYOVD to Exploit 34 Signed Vulnerable Drivers and Disable Security
item.description: A new analysis of endpoint detection and response (EDR) killers has revealed that 54 of them leverage a technique known as bring your own vulnerable driver (BYOVD) by abusing a total of 34...

item.title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
item.description: For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by...

item.title: Microsoft’s go-to Xbox controller is selling at its best price of the year
item.description: Microsoft’s Xbox console strategy needs work, but its Bluetooth-ready controller that shipped alongside the Xbox Series X and Series S is fantastic. We think it’s one of the best Xbox controllers...

item.title: Google Shakes Up Its Browser Agent Team Amid OpenClaw Craze
item.description: As Silicon Valley obsesses over a new wave of AI coding agents, Google and other AI labs are shifting their bets.

item.title: All the wrong EVs are getting canceled
item.description: These past few weeks have been particularly brutal for the EV industry - and anyone who believes that electric vehicles are the future. Thanks to slowing demand and policy whiplashes, automakers...

item.title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors
item.description: Meta believes these AI systems can detect more violations with greater accuracy, better prevent scams, respond more quickly to real-world events, and reduce over-enforcement.

item.title: Prediction markets are trying to lure journalists with partnership deals
item.description: Prediction markets are working to ingratiate themselves with mainstream news and culture: The Golden Globes broadcast in January was plastered with Polymarket odds, the AP is licensing election...

item.title: Google reveals its solution for true Android sideloading: a mandatory waiting period
item.description: Google has revealed the "advanced flow" that will be required to install certain Android apps once the company introduces mandatory developer verification later this year. The company had...

item.title: Meta is actually keeping its VR metaverse running, for now
item.description: Meta is reversing its plans to shut down its VR metaverse - sort of. On Monday, the company announced that it would be shutting down the VR version of its 3D social platform Horizon Worlds on June...

item.title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
item.description: Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

item.title: ChatGPT’s ‘Adult Mode’ Could Spark a New Era of Intimate Surveillance
item.description: OpenAI plans to allow sexting with ChatGPT. A human-AI interaction expert warns of a privacy nightmare.

item.title: Epic and Disney now let Fortnite creators make Star Wars games
item.description: Epic Games and Disney are making a big announcement as part of their continually deepening relationship. In June, Epic announced that Fortnite creators would "soon" be able to make custom Star...

item.title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
item.description: Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: FortiGate RaaS, Citrix Exploits, MCP Abuse, LiveChat Phish & More
item.description: ThreatsDay Bulletin is back on The Hacker News, and this week feels off in a familiar way. Nothing loud, nothing breaking everything at once. Just a lot of small things that shouldn’t work anymore...

item.title: Signal’s Creator Is Helping Encrypt Meta AI
item.description: Moxie Marlinspike says the technology powering his encrypted AI chatbot, Confer, will be integrated into Meta AI. The move could help protect the AI conversations of millions of people.
